summary: Project involves an admin panel with a fee payment tab and customize panel. User has provided a principal ID to be set as an admin.

new_feature_requests.summary: Set provided principal ID as admin in the application

Set the principal ID '25vbj-lny5e-uxjij-gyv6b-tshsm-glbla-mta6g-knjdg-7lo2f-hztzh-pae' as a hardcoded or seeded admin in the backend access control system so that this principal is recognized as an admin when the application checks for admin privileges.
